description_long: This is a compact submachine gun with a rectangular receiver and a prominent, perforated barrel shroud. The weapon features a slim, wire-style folding stock that extends from the rear and a vertical box magazine inserted into the grip. The grip itself is ergonomically shaped and appears to be made of a dark, possibly wooden or polymer material. The upper receiver is mostly matte black metal, with visible rivets and a simple iron sight system mounted along the top. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal external attachments and a focus on portability and ease of use in close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun with a wire folding stock, perforated barrel shroud, and a vertical box magazine in the grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, barrel opening, and the wire stock aligned behind the receiver.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the weapon, the perforated barrel shroud, folding wire stock, and the box magazine in the grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the wire stock loop, rear sight, and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the grip, magazine, and the wire stock, with the barrel shroud and receiver details visible.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with perforated shroud
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: simple notch rear sight with fixed front post
